elements.title: Mawson Peak
elements.contents: ... that Australia's only active volcanoes, including Mawson Peak (pictured), are located about 4,000 km (2,500 mi) from the mainland?

elements.title: Peter Brownell
elements.contents: ... that Peter Brownell won the 1993 mayoral election in Burlington, Vermont, despite having less money and fewer volunteers than his opponent?

elements.title: an episode of Stranger Things
elements.contents: ... that the character Eleven's outfit in an episode of Stranger Things was inspired by Madonna's clothing in the 1980s?

elements.title: B. Merrill Hopkinson
elements.contents: ... that dentist and dental medicine professor B. Merrill Hopkinson was also a singer who performed with the orchestra of the Metropolitan Opera?

elements.title: an Indonesian film about the hajj
elements.contents: ... that an Indonesian film about the hajj has been read as promoting a revolutionary ethos amidst the Cold War?

elements.title: Don W. Moore
elements.contents: ... that journalist Don W. Moore worked for both the Associated Press and United Press International without the knowledge of the other?

elements.title: an anti-immigration protest
elements.contents: ... that an attendee at an anti-immigration protest in Adelaide carried a placard depicting the alleged perpetrator of the Porepunkah police shootings?

elements.title: Taiga Takano
elements.contents: ... that voice actor Taiga Takano was scouted by seven companies at a newcomer audition?

elements.title: Annuzza, a Girl of Romania
elements.contents: ... that Annuzza, a Girl of Romania was considered to belong on the same shelf as Alice in Wonderland?
